mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_social WHERE provider = #{provider} AND provider_user_id = #{providerUserId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_social (user_id, provider, provider_user_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{provider}, #{providerUserId})
INSERT INTO email_verification (user_id, email, token, purpose, expired_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{email}, #{token}, #{purpose}, #{expiredAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE email_verification SET used = 1, used_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refresh_token (user_id, token, expired_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{token}, #{expiredAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE refresh_token SET revoked = 1 WHERE token = #{token}
UPDATE refresh_token SET revoked = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked = 0
